title: Daily Promotional Video Editing
brief: Fresh promotional footage lands on my desk every day, and I need it shaped into an engaging, public-facing video within 24 hours of delivery. Your main tasks are straightforward: • Trim and sequence the raw clips into a clear, dynamic story • Blend in background music that suits the message (I can supply tracks or you can source royalty-free options) • Sync and balance the provided voice-over so it sits cleanly in the mix • Export a polished 1080p (or higher) MP4 plus the editable project file The style should feel lively and accessible to the general public—nothing overly corporate or niche. Smooth transitions, tasteful color correction, and the occasional caption or lower-third are welcome if they help keep viewers’ attention, but the core priority is quick, consistent turnaround and audio-visual polish that makes each spot ready to post the same day it’s filmed. Raw clips and voice-over arrive via shared drive each afternoon; simply drop the finished files back in the folder and let me know they’re done. If this daily rhythm fits your workflow, I’m ready to start right away.
